calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jun-23-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brent Kato for (Trustee) Gene Marchi.

Mr. Kato responded to the examiner's notes stating that the trustee was approved for a certain fee amount to clear up the trust, that the 5 month period expired and they went over and that the amount over is a modest amount of fees. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FIRST ACCOUNTING OF TRUSTEE
Off Calendar May-27-2014 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FIRST ACCOUNTING OF TRUSTEE
Off Calendar Apr-28-2014 Continued To May-27-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FIRST ACCOUNTING OF TRUSTEE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2014 Continued To Apr-28-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FIRST ACCOUNTING OF TRUSTEE
Off Calendar Mar-11-2014 Continued To Apr-14-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Nov-01-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brent Kato for and with Gene Marchi.

The Court stated that it is not concerned about the venue issue as it seems that they are headed towards distribution. Mr. Kato stated that they anticipate the personal item (tapestry) being sold soon, and that they will file an accounting but it won't be a final accounting. The Court stated that it will authorize distribution of $1,000,000.00 with the exception of $200,000.00 pending an accounting and final distribution. Mr. Kato also stated that there are no creditors and no claims. The Court granted the petition for instructions as to the sum of $1,000,000.00 (subject to receipt and review of a revised order). Mr. Kato is to submit a modified order.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Whitney. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Oct-16-2013 Continued To Oct-30-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Oct-02-2013 Continued To Oct-16-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
